headline: IMPORT MEDICINES WITHOUT CROSSING THE LINE
subheading: Know exactly where your WDA ends and an MIA begins before MHRA does.
flux_prompt: A sophisticated clinical-luxury editorial scene evoking cross-border pharmaceutical importation into Great Britain under a wholesale dealer's authorisation. A pristine sealed medicine carton glides along a luminous teal threshold line that bisects the frame, symbolising the precise regulatory boundary between wholesale receipt and manufacturing certification. On one side, a temperature-controlled shipping container with a softly glowing cyan data-logger trace; on the other, a calm deep-navy customs gateway suggested by frosted glass and brushed-steel arches. Subtle floating abstract elements suggest a verified chain of custody: delicate interlocking nodes and a faint document audit trail rendered as thin glowing teal threads, with a single fresh-green checkmark accent confirming approved-country eligibility and ALCOA+ traceability. Cool cinematic light rakes across polished surfaces, shallow depth of field, premium and meticulous, conveying secure, defensible global supply-chain integrity. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
